action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 3 failed because torchaudio.load now requires torchcodec, which is not installed. The pretrained MetricGAN+ checkpoint is still the best path to a high PESQ baseline. Analysis: Instead of installing torchcodec, I will switch all audio I/O to soundfile (already pre-installed) and ensure predict.py loads/saves WAVs correctly. I also need a local validation script to compute PESQ before burning an eval iteration. Decision: 1) Rewrite predict.py to use soundfile.read/write. 2) Write validate_pretrained.py that runs inference on val_noisy and computes PESQ against val_clean. 3) Run validation. 4) If PESQ looks good, submit eval.
